sections.paragraph:
Original: תּקל

Transliteration: teqal

Phonetic: tek-al'

BDB Definition:

  1. to weigh (verb)
    1. (Peil) to be weighed
  2. tekel, shekel (noun masculine)
    1. (Peal) tekel - a unit of weight, shekel

Origin: corresponding to H8254

TWOT entry: 3063,3063a

Part(s) of speech:
